summary: All Dashboard Bifurcation Features VERIFIED - All 11 backend API tests PASSED + All 5 frontend pages WORKING. Sales Dashboard shows Top 10 Overall + Top 5 This Month charts, CS Dashboard shows Agent Bifurcation with SLA rates + period filter, Mentor Dashboard shows Mentor Bifurcation with redeposits + period filter, Customer Master shows 901 customers with Course column and Enrollment Date, Finance Receivables shows 899 records totaling AED 2,174,969.
passed_tests: Backend: test_login_success - Super Admin login works
Backend: test_top_10_agents_overall - GET /api/dashboard/sales-agent-closings?period=overall&limit=10 returns 200 with agent data
Backend: test_top_5_agents_this_month - GET /api/dashboard/sales-agent-closings?period=this_month&limit=5 returns 200
Backend: test_cs_agent_bifurcation_overall - GET /api/dashboard/cs-agent-bifurcation?period=overall returns CS agents with student counts and SLA rates
Backend: test_cs_agent_bifurcation_this_month - Period filter works for CS agent bifurcation
Backend: test_mentor_bifurcation_overall - GET /api/dashboard/mentor-bifurcation?period=overall returns mentors with student counts and redeposit data
Backend: test_mentor_bifurcation_this_month - Period filter works for mentor bifurcation
Backend: test_customers_sorted_ascending - GET /api/customers returns 901 customers
Backend: test_customers_default_get - Customers API returns data correctly
Backend: test_finance_receivables - GET /api/finance/clt/receivables returns 899 receivables
Backend: test_courses_have_price_fields - GET /api/courses returns 46 courses with price fields
Frontend: Sales Dashboard - Top 10 Agents Overall chart displayed
Frontend: Sales Dashboard - Top 5 Agents This Month chart displayed
Frontend: CS Dashboard - Agent Bifurcation section with SLA rates (5 agents, 901 total students)
Frontend: CS Dashboard - Period filter dropdown works (changed to This Month)
Frontend: Mentor Dashboard - Mentor Bifurcation section with redeposits (6 mentors, 901 students)
Frontend: Mentor Dashboard - Period filter dropdown works
Frontend: Customer Master - 901 customers displayed with Course column and Enrollment Date column
Frontend: Courses Page - 46 courses with prices displayed
Frontend: Finance Receivables - 899 records displayed, Total AED 2,174,969

sales_dashboard_top_agents.details: Sales Dashboard shows Top 10 Agents Overall chart (horizontal bar chart showing Aleesha at top with ~100 closings) and Top 5 Agents This Month chart (vertical bar chart with closings and revenue)

cs_dashboard_agent_bifurcation.details: CS Dashboard shows Agent Bifurcation section with 5 CS agents (Della Mariyam Shaji: 282 students, Karthika P.K: 274 students, Nasida VN: 153 students, Falja Nizar: 146 students, etc.). SLA rates displayed (100% for all agents). Period filter dropdown with Overall/This Month options.

mentor_dashboard_bifurcation.details: Mentor Dashboard shows Mentor Bifurcation section with 6 mentors (Ashwin Sudarsh: 224 students, Edwin Joy: 165 students, Nihal Azhikodan: 164 students, etc.). Redeposit amounts displayed (AED 0 currently). Period filter dropdown works.

customer_master_with_course.details: Customer Master page shows 901 customers with Course column (Basic Package, Basic Package - 2, etc.) and Enrollment Date column (24/10/2024, 01/01/2025, etc.). Data sorted by date ascending as expected. Total Revenue: AED 2,174,969, 899 transactions.

finance_receivables.details: Finance Receivables page shows 899 of 899 records with Total: AED 2,174,969.00. Date column visible. Records sorted by date.

courses_with_price.details: Courses page shows 46 courses with Price field displayed (AED 5,000, AED 15,000, AED 2,604, etc.). Both imported courses and original courses have price information.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All 5 dashboard pages loading correctly with expected data)

seed_data_creation: Using existing imported data: 901 students, 899 LTV transactions, 901 customers
context_for_next_testing_agent: All dashboard bifurcation features verified working. Sales Dashboard has Top 10 Overall + Top 5 This Month agent charts. CS Dashboard has Agent Bifurcation with SLA rates and period filter. Mentor Dashboard has Mentor Bifurcation with redeposits and period filter. Customer Master has 901 customers with Course and Enrollment Date columns. Finance Receivables has 899 records totaling AED 2,174,969. All period filters functional. Backend APIs: /api/dashboard/sales-agent-closings, /api/dashboard/cs-agent-bifurcation, /api/dashboard/mentor-bifurcation all working with period parameters.
testing_method: Backend pytest (11 tests) + Playwright browser automation for frontend verification
